heading: Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program
label: 1445c Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program
notes: CodificationFor similar provisions relating to the Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program, see .section 1445c–1 of this title

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish and administer through the National Ocean Service the Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program. Under the program, the Secretary shall award graduate education scholarships in oceanography, marine biology or maritime archeology, to be known as Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarships.
to recognize outstanding scholarship in oceanography, marine biology, or maritime archeology, particularly by women and members of minority groups; and
to encourage independent graduate level research in oceanography, marine biology, or maritime archeology.
shall be used to support graduate studies in oceanography, marine biology, or maritime archeology at a graduate level institution of higher education; and
shall be awarded in accordance with guidelines issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Distribution of funds
children.label: d Distribution of funds
children.text: The amount of each Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship shall be provided directly to a recipient selected by the Secretary upon receipt of certification that the recipient will adhere to a specific and detailed plan of study and research approved by a graduate level institution of higher education.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: e Funding
children.text: Of the amount available each fiscal year to carry out this chapter, the Secretary shall award 1 percent as Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarships.

children.heading: Scholarship repayment requirement
children.label: f Scholarship repayment requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall require an individual receiving a scholarship under this section to repay the full amount of the scholarship to the Secretary if the Secretary determines that the individual, in obtaining or using the scholarship, engaged in fraudulent conduct or failed to comply with any term or condition of the scholarship.

children.heading: Maritime archeology defined
children.label: g Maritime archeology defined
children.text: In this section the term “maritime archeology” includes the curation, preservation, and display of maritime artifacts.
